patch.insert_text: - Started meperidine 50 mg tablets for the worse stretches
added_claims: Meperidine 50 mg tablets started for the worse stretches (severe pain)

reasons: Insertion matches evidence: meperidine 50 mg tablets started for the worse (severe) stretches of pain.
Note only mentions naproxen for pain; meperidine is a new, non-duplicated medication.
A pain medication belongs in the Assessment and Plan (Pain) section, so placement is correct.
